zh.lifeSummary: Jutta von Jülich是Wilhelm (I.) von Jülich和N.N.的女兒，於大約1157年出生在德國海因里希_海普洛文次爾利。她和Eberhard II. von Hengebach至少有6個兒子和5個女兒。她去世於大約1218年在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫迪倫海巴賀享年63歲。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Jülich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto.

variants.name: Juhl
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ernst, Arno, Erwin, Heinz, Kurt.

Danish and Norwegian: nickname for someone who was born on Christmas Day or had some other connection with this time of year, from Old Norse jól. This was originally the name of a pagan midwinter festival, which was later appropriated by the Christian Church for celebration of the birth of Christ.
German (of Slavic origin): nickname or topographic name from a Germanized Slavic stem gol ‘naked, barren’.

nameMeanings.name: Jutta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Judith  , also used as an independent given name.

en.lifeSummary: Jutta von Jülich was born about 1157, in Jülich, Rhineland, Prussia, Germany as the daughter of Wilhelm (I.) von Jülich and N.N.. She had at least 6 sons and 5 daughters with Eberhard II. von Hengebach. She died about 1218, in Heimbach, Düren, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Jutta von Jülich est née environ 1157, à Jülich, Rhénanie, Prusse, Allemagne, fille de Wilhelm (I.) von Jülich et N.N.. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles avec Eberhard II. von Hengebach. Elle est décédée environ 1218, à Heimbach, Düren, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Jutta von Jülich wurde um 1157 in Jülich, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Deutschland, als Tochter von Wilhelm (I.) von Jülich und N.N. geboren. Sie hatte mit Eberhard II. von Hengebach mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb um 1218 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Heimbach, Düren, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Jutta von Jülich è nata il circa 1157 nel Jülich, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Germania come figlia di Wilhelm (I.) von Jülich e N.N.. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie con Eberhard II. von Hengebach. Morì circa 1218, nel Heimbach, Düren, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jutta von Jülichは約1157年にドイツプレウssンルヘインプロヴィンズジuリチでWilhelm (I.) von JülichとN.N.の娘として生まれた。彼女はEberhard II. von Hengebachとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1218年にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンドuレンヘインバチで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jutta von Jülich(은)는 대략 1157년 독일 플레우ss 리인플로빈츠 제이u리치에서 Wilhelm (I.) von Jülich(와)과 N.N.의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Eberhard II. von Hengebach(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1218년 독일 노르드하이-베스트파렌 드u런 하임바치에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.um 1157–um 1218: tany ho any amin'ny 1157–tany ho any amin'ny 1218

pt.lifeSummary: Jutta von Jülich nasceu aproximadamente 1157, em Jülich, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Alemanha filha de Wilhelm (I.) von Jülich e N.N.. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas com Eberhard II. von Hengebach. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1218, em Heimbach, Düren, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Jutta von Jülich родилась около 1157 г. в местности джuлич, раинпровинз, Пруссия, Германия. Её родителей звали Wilhelm (I.) von Jülich и N.N. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей от Eberhard II. von Hengebach. Она умерла около 1218 г. в местности химбач, дuрен, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия в возрасте 63 лет.

sm.um 1157–um 1218: e tusa o le 1157–e tusa o le 1218

es.lifeSummary: Jutta von Jülich nació aproximadamente 1157, en Jülich, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Alemania como hija de Wilhelm (I.) von Jülich y N.N.. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas con Eberhard II. von Hengebach. Murió aproximadamente 1218, en Heimbach, Düren, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania, a la edad de 63 años.
